creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rm          2011-12-16 10:26:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/py-pylibacl Makefile pkg-descr 
  Removed files:
    security/py-pylibacl pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - change USE_PYTHON to yes, because this port working
    with any supported python version
  - move pkg-plist into PLIST_FILES
  - remove Author field from pkg-descr
  - bump PORTREVISION because of dependencies change
  
  PR:             163329
  Submitted by:   rm (myself)
  Approved by:    joris dedieu <joris.dedieu at gmail.com> (maintainer),
                  miwi (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4       +4 -2      ports/security/py-pylibacl/Makefile
  1.3       +0 -1      ports/security/py-pylibacl/pkg-descr
  1.2       +0 -1      ports/security/py-pylibacl/pkg-plist (dead)
